plugin_desc: RACOM RAy microwave backhaul transmission SNMP baseline child template for devices under RACOM PEN 33555. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Stable private CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health scalars are not proven in the current MIB facts, so they are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: Transmission
